title: AN ACT AMENDING AND REPEALING CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5219 / 52 OG No. 7, 3529 (July, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1458, June 14, 1956 ]

AN ACT AMENDING AND REPEALING CERTAIN ITEMS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Items (

c

) and (

i

), paragraph thirty-two, for the Province of Mindoro Oriental, subsection section two of Republic Act numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is amended to read as follows:

"(

c

) Extension of Pinamalayan Waterworks to Lumangbayan ...................... P8,000.00

"(

i

) Pinamalayan Municipal Building, Construction ....................................... 9,000.00"

SEC. 2. Item (

v

), paragraph thirty-two, for the Province of Mindoro Oriental, subsection "

f

" section two of the same Act is repealed.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 14, 1956.
